name: multi team player team stats obj 2021
description: OBJ 2021 multi-team: player_nfl_teams shows CLE and LA; team stat resolves to CLE (9 games > LA 8, tie-break not needed)
expected_query: with "t80855b3d966ebdc1bd682983e80e67b6" as materialized (select "player_gamelogs_year_2021"."pid", count(*) as "rate_type_total_count", array_agg(distinct player_gamelogs_year_2021.tm) as teams from "player_gamelogs_year_2021" left join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs_year_2021"."esbid" where "player_gamelogs_year_2021"."active" = true and "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2021) group by "player_gamelogs_year_2021"."pid"), "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7" as materialized (select "nfl_plays"."off" as "nfl_team", SUM(pass_yds) AS team_pass_yds_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2021) group by "nfl_plays"."off"), "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats" as materialized (select "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7"."nfl_team", sum(t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7.team_pass_yds_from_plays) as team_pass_yds_from_plays from "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7" group by "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7"."nfl_team"), "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2021]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years), "player_year_teams" as materialized (select "pid", "year", (array_agg(tm ORDER BY game_count DESC, tm ASC))[1] as team from (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."tm", count(*) as "game_count" from "player_gamelogs" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2021) and "player_gamelogs"."year" in (2021) group by "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."tm") as "player_year_team_counts" group by "pid", "year") select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, t80855b3d966ebdc1bd682983e80e67b6.teams as player_nfl_teams_0, "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats"."team_pass_yds_from_plays" AS "team_pass_yds_from_plays_0", "player"."pos" from "player" left join "t80855b3d966ebdc1bd682983e80e67b6" on "t80855b3d966ebdc1bd682983e80e67b6"."pid" = "player"."pid" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "player_year_teams" on "player_year_teams"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "player_year_teams"."year" = 2021 left join "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats" on "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats"."nfl_team" = "player_year_teams"."team" group by player.fname, player.lname, t80855b3d966ebdc1bd682983e80e67b6.teams, "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats"."team_pass_yds_from_plays", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 5 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
